title: CleanSpark Q3 FY2023 Financial Results: 16 EH/s Expansion Fully Funded
text: CleanSpark reported third quarter revenues of $45.5 million, representing a 47% increase year-over-year from $31.0 million. The company posted a net loss of $14.2 million compared to a $29.3 million loss in the prior year period. Adjusted EBITDA improved significantly to $13.3 million versus $5.1 million previously. As of June 30, 2023, the company maintained liquidity of approximately $35.7 million, combining $21.8 million in cash with $13.9 million in bitcoin holdings. Total assets reached $652.8 million, with stockholders equity of $603.6 million against relatively modest liabilities of $49.2 million. According to CEO Zach Bradford, We have fully funded our growth to 16 EH/s, including miners, facilities, and other infrastructure, on top of a record-breaking quarter. The company's operating hashrate exceeded 9 EH/s, representing a tripling of capacity year-over-year. Sequential performance showed continued momentum, with revenues increasing 7% from the prior quarter and net losses improving by $4.3 million sequentially. The company holds approximately 1,200 bitcoins on its balance sheet and projects sufficient capital to reach its 16 EH/s expansion target.
